channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump Says U.S. Will Give Ukraine Right to Make Patriot Missiles
item.description: President Trump stated Wednesday that the U.S. will grant Ukraine a production license to build Patriot missile interceptors for defense purposes.

item.title: How Democrats could replace a Maine Senate nominee if Platner withdraws
item.description: Democrats have a short window to replace candidate Graham Platner on the ballot if he exits following a sexual assault allegation.

item.title: What interest can you earn with a 4.20% CD account today?
item.description: A 4.20% CD account is easy to find now. Here is how much interest that rate can generate.

item.title: White House launches 'Freedom Fuel' station selling gas at $3.47
item.description: The Freedom Fuel Network offers gasoline at more than 30 cents below the national average.
